evidence_refs.quote: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive language model inference by drafting candidate token sequences and verifying them against the target model in a single forward pass. We evaluate whether a code-aware trace and suffix cache—exploiting the high degree of repeated identifiers, imports, braces, and boilerplate in code workloads—can serve as a viable drafting source for speculative and lookahead decoding.
